retention_days.description: How many days to retain audit_log rows before the nightly purge job removes them. Default: 2555 (7 years, meets CBE Reg 22/2022 §8.3).

anchor_schedule_cron.description: Cron expression for the automated OTS chain-head anchor job. Example: '0 2 * * *' = 02:00 daily. Empty string disables the schedule.

export_formats_enabled.description: Which export formats Doc Admins may use. Subset of [json, csv, pdf].

default_filter_set_per_role.description: Per-role default filter presets shown when the Audit Log page first loads. Keys are role names; values are filter objects matching the /spa/api/audit/events query params.

fts_enabled.description: Whether the FTS5 search tab is visible in the UI. Disable if the DB is under heavy write load and the sync triggers cause contention.

verify_chain_window.description: Number of most-recent audit_log rows the browser walks when verifying the hash chain on page load. Higher values catch older tampering but add client-side CPU time.
